title: Method Level 6
summary: Ab major (4 flats), Dorian and Mixolydian modal scales, syncopated rhythms, and an eight-measure finale in Ab — bridging tonal and modal reading.

exercises.title: Ab Major Scale RH
exercises.summary: Right hand Ab major scale across a full octave with all four flats.
exercises.goal: Read and play all eight notes of Ab major, noting every flat accurately.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Ab Major Scale LH
exercises.summary: Left hand Ab major scale across a full octave in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play Ab major cleanly in bass clef with all four flats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Ab Major Melody RH
exercises.summary: A four-phrase melody in Ab major moving through tonic, subdominant, and dominant.
exercises.goal: Shape a lyrical melody in Ab major with smooth voice leading.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Ab Eighth-Note Étude RH
exercises.summary: Ascending and descending Ab major in eighth notes with a closing phrase.
exercises.goal: Keep all four flats even at an eighth-note tempo in Ab major.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz in Ab
exercises.summary: A waltz-style melody in 3/4 in Ab major across six measures.
exercises.goal: Feel the waltz lilt in 3/4 while navigating Ab major's four flats.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Ab Bass Line LH
exercises.summary: Left hand broken-chord bass pattern across Ab, Db, and Eb positions.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing bass line through three Ab-key chord shapes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Dorian Scale RH
exercises.summary: Right hand D Dorian mode scale (D E F G A B C D) — a minor scale with a raised sixth.
exercises.goal: Hear and play the distinctive raised-sixth sound of the Dorian mode.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Dorian Melody RH
exercises.summary: A four-phrase melody in D Dorian highlighting the raised sixth B natural.
exercises.goal: Express the modal colour of Dorian through a singable four-phrase melody.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Dorian Scale RH
exercises.summary: Right hand A Dorian mode scale (A B C D E F# G A) — same key signature as G major.
exercises.goal: Play A Dorian, recognising the F-sharp raised sixth against the natural seventh.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Dorian Melody RH
exercises.summary: A four-phrase melody in A Dorian using the F-sharp colour note.
exercises.goal: Use the raised sixth F-sharp as a melodic highlight in A Dorian.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Mixolydian Scale RH
exercises.summary: Right hand G Mixolydian scale (G A B C D E F G) — major scale with a lowered seventh.
exercises.goal: Play G Mixolydian, noticing the F natural that lowers the seventh degree.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Mixolydian Melody RH
exercises.summary: A four-phrase melody in G Mixolydian featuring the lowered seventh F natural.
exercises.goal: Express the bluesy quality of Mixolydian through a smooth four-phrase melody.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Mixed Flat-Key Étude
exercises.summary: Passages shifting between Eb and Ab regions in the three-flat key signature.
exercises.goal: Navigate smoothly between Eb and Ab melodic regions within one étude.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Syncopated Rhythm in Ab
exercises.summary: A melody in Ab major using the quarter–eighth–eighth syncopation pattern.
exercises.goal: Feel the off-beat push of syncopation while reading Ab major accurately.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Finale in Ab
exercises.summary: An eight-measure piece in Ab major drawing on scales, melody, and flat-key phrasing.
exercises.goal: Play a complete musical statement in Ab major with smooth tone and steady rhythm.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
